description: Escape to the breathtaking landscapes of Banff and Jasper, where the majestic Rocky Mountains cradle turquoise lakes and lush forests. This 7-day adventure is perfect for families, offering a blend of stunning natural beauty, exhilarating hikes, and memorable experiences that will leave everyone in awe. From the iconic Lake Louise to the serene Maligne Lake, immerse yourself in the wonders of nature and create unforgettable family memories in Canada's most stunning national parks.

transit.memo: Enjoy a scenic drive through the Canadian Rockies.

activities.description: Settle into the luxurious Fairmont Banff Springs, known as the 'Castle in the Rockies'. This historic hotel offers stunning views and is a perfect base for your adventures.
Savor a delicious lunch at The Vermillion Room, featuring local ingredients and a beautiful view of the mountains. Try their famous bison burger for a true taste of Alberta!
Take a short drive to Lake Louise, renowned for its turquoise waters and stunning mountain backdrop. Enjoy a leisurely walk along the lakeshore or rent a canoe for a unique perspective.
Embark on a family-friendly hike to Lake Agnes, where you can enjoy breathtaking views and the serene atmosphere of the surrounding wilderness. The trail is well-marked and suitable for children.
End your day with a delightful dinner at The Lakeview Lounge, offering a cozy atmosphere and a menu featuring local specialties. Don't miss their signature dessert, the 'Banff Chocolate Cake'.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Maple Leaf, known for its Canadian-inspired dishes. Enjoy a delicious plate of pancakes or eggs benedict to fuel your adventures ahead.
Take a short drive to Bow Falls, a stunning waterfall located just outside of Banff. The roar of the water and the picturesque views make it a perfect spot for family photos.
Embark on a family-friendly hike up Sulphur Mountain. The trail offers breathtaking views of the surrounding mountains and valleys. Don't forget to bring your camera for some amazing shots!
Enjoy a farm-to-table lunch at The Bison Restaurant, where you can savor local ingredients and dishes inspired by Canadian cuisine. The cozy atmosphere is perfect for families.
Take the Banff Gondola for a scenic ride to the top of Sulphur Mountain. The panoramic views from the summit are absolutely breathtaking and a must-see for all visitors.
Stroll through the charming streets of Banff Town. Visit local shops, art galleries, and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere. It's a great way to relax after a day of hiking.

End your day with a delicious dinner at Park Distillery, where you can enjoy a variety of dishes made with locally sourced ingredients. The distillery atmosphere adds a unique touch to your dining experience.
Return to your hotel and unwind after a day filled with adventure. Enjoy some family time and share your favorite moments from the day.

transit.memo: Enjoy the stunning views along the Icefields Parkway.

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Tooloulou's, known for its delicious Canadian-style dishes. Try their famous pancakes or the eggs benedict for a delightful morning meal.
Embark on a scenic drive along the Icefields Parkway, one of the most beautiful drives in the world. Marvel at the breathtaking mountain views and keep an eye out for wildlife along the way.
Make a stop at Peyto Lake, famous for its unique wolf-head shape and stunning turquoise color. A short hike will take you to the viewpoint for a perfect family photo opportunity.
Arrive in Jasper and check into your hotel. Take some time to relax and prepare for an afternoon of exploration in Jasper National Park.
Enjoy a casual lunch at Jasper Brewing Company, where you can savor local craft beers and hearty pub fare. The atmosphere is family-friendly and perfect for a midday break.
Take a guided tour to Athabasca Glacier, where you can walk on the ice and learn about the glacier's formation. This is a unique experience that the whole family will enjoy.
Stroll through the charming Jasper townsite, where you can shop for souvenirs and enjoy the local vibe. Don't forget to grab some ice cream from a local shop to cool off!
End your day with a delightful dinner at The Raven Bistro, known for its fresh, locally sourced ingredients and creative dishes. A perfect way to unwind after a day of adventure.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Inn Grill, known for its delicious pancakes and locally sourced ingredients. It's a great way to fuel up for a day of adventure in Jasper National Park.

Embark on a scenic cruise on Maligne Lake, famous for its stunning turquoise waters and the iconic Spirit Island. This is a perfect opportunity to capture breathtaking photos and enjoy the serene beauty of the lake.
After the cruise, enjoy a relaxing lunch at the Maligne Lake Café, where you can savor local dishes while taking in the stunning views of the lake.
Head to Medicine Lake, a unique body of water that changes dramatically with the seasons. Take a leisurely walk along the shore and enjoy the picturesque scenery, perfect for family photos.
Spend some time exploring Jasper Town, where you can visit local shops, art galleries, and enjoy the charming mountain town atmosphere. Don't forget to grab some souvenirs!

End your day with a family-friendly dinner at Jasper Brewing Company, where you can enjoy craft beers and a variety of delicious dishes made from local ingredients. The atmosphere is lively and welcoming.

activities.activity: Evening Stroll in Jasper National Park
activities.description: Take a peaceful evening stroll in Jasper National Park. The park is known for its stunning sunsets, and this is a perfect way to unwind after a day of exploration.

activities.activity: Breakfast at The Jasper Brewing Company
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at this local favorite. Enjoy a selection of delicious breakfast options, including their famous breakfast burrito and freshly brewed coffee, all while soaking in the cozy atmosphere.

Explore the stunning Maligne Canyon, one of Jasper's most breathtaking natural wonders. Walk along the trails and marvel at the deep gorges and cascading waterfalls. Keep an eye out for wildlife such as elk and deer!
After your hike, enjoy a relaxing lunch at the Maligne Lake Café. Savor local dishes while taking in the spectacular views of the lake and surrounding mountains.

Take a ride on the Jasper SkyTram for breathtaking panoramic views of the Canadian Rockies. The tramway ascends to an elevation of 2,263 meters, offering stunning vistas that are perfect for family photos.
After descending from the SkyTram, embark on a family-friendly hike on Whistler Mountain. The trails are well-marked and offer a chance to see wildflowers and possibly some wildlife along the way.

activities.activity: Dinner at The Fiddle River Restaurant
activities.description: End your day with a delightful dinner at The Fiddle River Restaurant. Enjoy a menu featuring local ingredients and specialties, including fresh fish and game dishes, all in a warm and inviting setting.

As night falls, take advantage of Jasper's dark skies for some stargazing. The park is a designated Dark Sky Preserve, making it one of the best places in the world to see the stars. Bring a blanket and enjoy the celestial show!

transit.memo: Enjoy the scenic drive back to Banff, with opportunities to stop for photos along the way.

activities.description: Indulge in a delicious meal featuring Canadian cuisine at The Maple Leaf, known for its cozy atmosphere and locally sourced ingredients. A perfect spot to recharge after your drive!
Explore the stunning Johnston Canyon, where you can walk along the catwalks and see the beautiful waterfalls. This family-friendly hike offers breathtaking views and is suitable for all ages.
Take a scenic boat cruise on Lake Minnewanka, surrounded by majestic mountains and crystal-clear waters. Keep an eye out for wildlife as you glide across the lake!
Enjoy a farm-to-table dining experience at The Bison, where you can savor dishes made from local ingredients. The rustic ambiance and delicious food make it a great choice for families.
Take a leisurely evening stroll through Banff's charming streets. Enjoy the vibrant atmosphere, shop for souvenirs, and soak in the stunning mountain views as the sun sets.
Start your day with a hearty breakfast at The Maple Leaf, known for its Canadian-inspired dishes. Enjoy a delicious plate of pancakes or a classic eggs benedict to fuel up for your adventures ahead.
Relax and unwind at the Banff Upper Hot Springs. Soak in the warm mineral waters while enjoying stunning views of the surrounding mountains. It's a perfect way to start your last day in Banff.

activities.activity: Scenic Drive along Bow Valley Parkway
activities.description: Take a leisurely drive along the Bow Valley Parkway, one of the most scenic routes in Canada. Keep an eye out for wildlife and stop at viewpoints to capture the breathtaking landscapes.
Enjoy a farm-to-table lunch at The Bison Restaurant, where you can savor local ingredients and dishes inspired by Canadian cuisine. The cozy atmosphere is perfect for families.
Head to the iconic Lake Louise, famous for its stunning turquoise waters. Take a family-friendly hike around the lake or simply relax and take in the views. Don't forget your camera!

activities.activity: Return to Banff and explore local shops
activities.description: Spend your last afternoon exploring the charming shops in Banff. Pick up some souvenirs or local crafts to remember your trip. It's a great way to soak in the local culture one last time.
End your trip with a unique dining experience at The Grizzly House, known for its fondue and exotic meats. It's a fun and interactive way to enjoy dinner with the family.
